feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: I'll Look Away and Smile Wide (You Found Me)
entry.summary:
Author: miladystark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,583Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: What begins as a lighthearted road trip home quickly turns into a nightmare when Buck and Eddie are caught in a brutal car crash. Eddie wakes up in the hospital only to discover Buck is missing. “Buck?” The nurse frowned. “Sir, you need to—” “Where is he?” Eddie demanded. The doctor spoke carefully. “We only received one patient from the accident scene.” The words didn’t make sense. Eddie shook his head immediately.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Kiss Me Softly (Love Me Rough)
entry.summary:
Author: kimminie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,092Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck and Ryan could stand each other. At least that’s what they tell everyone. Between shared laughs in groups, fake smiles across their faces when they look at each other, there is still this feeling of pure hatred. The games are long over, but due to unknown reasons (that’s what Eddie told them) Buck and Eddie were forced to temporarily stay with the 113. Ryan tries his hardest to keep up the image, and be a good lieutenant to his new crew mates, and it works with Eddie, but Buck is another story. So when they had a few drinks too much, it lead to one thing or another. It’s not a fight, at least not in a bar. ——— Or: Buck and Ryan fall into a spiral of unknown feelings after a “mistake” and now have to coordinate their lives with said feelings. For some it’s easier than for others.

entry.title: Courage, Thy Name Is Tequila
entry.summary:
Author: untoldchaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,302Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 515

Summary: “We don’t have drinks. I should get some,” Eddie offered as an excuse.“No, you stay, I’ll get it.”Before Eddie could insist, he was silenced by the view of Buck standing up from the water, swim trunks dripping wet and plastered to his large, muscular thighs. Every curve of his body was accentuated in that moment. It was like a slow motion Baywatch scene and Eddie was no better than a horny teenager.Buck's housewarming party ends in the hot tub, where one thing leads to another, and Eddie finds himself feeling very attracted to his best friend.

entry.title: you owe me a debt, you stole him from me
entry.summary:
Author: opspsychic81

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,400Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 118

Summary: Buck is tired. Incredibly so. No one at the 118 wants anything to do with him since he dropped the stupid lawsuit. The pain is too much. Knowing the burden he had unravelled onto them, almost costing them all their jobs, is a guilt like no other. He decides to fix the way he’s feeling, and believes the one way to do so is to not be here anymore. — Buck does something really stupid whilst his mental health is at an all time low. His texts to the wrong diaz may have just saved his life, and opened it to a new journey of forgiveness and healing.

entry.title: 13 Nights in the Desert
entry.summary:
Author: BlessedFoxDiety

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,075Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 6

Summary: Five days ago, I woke beneath the cold glow of hospital lights, my mind wrapped in fog and fragments. The world felt distant, like I had surfaced from deep water. A doctor stood over me, speaking gently, but his words drifted past me like echoes I couldn’t quite catch. I didn’t understand why I was there… why my body felt so heavy. The last clear moment I remember lives somewhere softer. I was in the car with Buck. "Count Your Blessings" hummed through the speakers, warm and slow, filling the quiet space between us. I turned to look at Buck. He was smiling—one of those effortless smiles that pulls at the corners of his mouth just enough to deepen the line of his jaw. The light caught the curve of it, and for a moment I couldn’t look away. There was something disarming about it… beautiful in a way that made the air feel warmer, thicker. I remember thinking how peaceful that moment felt.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: loosened up and losing it
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,659Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 84

Summary: Eddie’s massage therapist is Briana.  He confirmed this six times: twice on the website, once during a phone call he made from his truck in the grocery store parking lot like it was a covert operation, three more times in the confirmation email. "Eddie?" He looks up. That is not Briana. The guy standing in the hallway entrance is tall and built like someone whose job description wildly undersold the physical reality. There's a birthmark above his eye that shouldn't work but does, way too much, and his scrubs fit him well. They — okay. They fit him obscenely well, actually. His arms. God, his arms. They're just arms. Everyone has arms. Eddie is suddenly, involuntarily, thinking about what it would feel like to have those arms braced on either side of him. Or around him. Or holding him down. Which is not a thought he's ever had about a man's arms before. He's pretty sure. He's almost sure. He's going to move on from this. He is going to stop looking at the arms. Any second now. Or,It's just a massage. Eddie can survive that. Right?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: gotta go
entry.summary:
Author: maydecember

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,483Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

Summary: “I have to pee,” Buck whines, clutching Eddie’s hair. “Please?” “Stay,” Eddie repeats, lips trailing down Buck’s neck again. He rolls his hips, cock dragging against Buck’s, and Buck moans shakily, squirming where he sits. “I can’t,” he huffs, before inhaling sharply as Eddie sucks a hickey into his neck. “Fuck, Eddie. I really gotta go.” “You’ll—” Another kiss. “—be fine. You’re a big boy. You can hold it.” He leans back up, pressing their lips together again, and this time Buck is lazy with it, slowly licking into his mouth, tongues moving together, because now all he can think is I’m seriously going to fucking pee myself.

entry.title: Dorm Room 118
entry.summary:
Author: loving-you-is-payneful (LightFairy)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,128Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 12

Summary: When Buck moves into Dorm Room 118, he’s hoping college will finally give him the fresh start he’s been craving. Instead, he finds himself drawn to his quiet, guarded roommate, Eddie. Over the course of their college years these two find out that family is not just the people that you were born into. It’s also the people you choose along the way.

entry.title: Five minutes. 🚒
entry.summary:
Author: Castielxdean_impala

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 847Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: “Buck?” Static hissed. Then, thinner: “I’m here.” Eddie exhaled sharply through his nose. “Do not go quiet on me. You hear me? You keep talking.” A weak breath ghosted through the radio -almost a laugh. “Bossy,” Buck managed. Despite everything, Eddie’s grip tightened on the edge of the shaft. “Yeah,” he said roughly. “You love it.” Above him, metal groaned. Water surged audibly in the background of Buck’s mic, higher now. “…Eddie.” “I’ve got you,” Eddie said, firm and immediate. “You just keep your head up and keep talking to me. We’re working to get you out.” Buck swallowed hard. “…Copy that,” he whispered.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Thousand Years
entry.summary:
Author: RedANDBlueLIGHTS

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,757Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: "What the-" He mummered he must be hallucinating— but right as he was about to try again Eddie sprinted past him— through him, and kneeled down to a patient— buck assumed. But it still didn't explain the fact that Eddie when through him"No, no, no, no" Eddie kept muttering, "hey Ed-" Buck was shocked. The man before him, was laying in a pool of blood, like he was swimming in it. His neck kept releasing blood, drowning that person staining the white tiles, but it isn't just any person, when he looked at the man laying.It was him. Sprawled in his own blood, eyes half open. OrBuck dies and his ghost haunt Eddie Diaz.

entry.title: As time goes by...
entry.summary:
Author: Deangirl99

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,221Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 152

Summary: Fate of one person changes by a single decision. And Evan Buckley's life changed the day when the Buckleys decided to give him up.As fate would have it, he was adopted by his uncle promising him to protect him, love him and to give him a life he truely deserves.Let's watch the highlights of his life, shall we?

entry.title: pretend we're in love
entry.summary:
Author: buckemdiaz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 143,168Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 834

Summary: “I have to go to a wedding,” he says, voice tight. Eddie’s eyebrows scrunch in confusion. That’s it? “You love weddings.” “Not this one. It’s in Pennsylvania. With my mom and dad. For a whole week,” he says, frustration evident in his tone. Well that makes a lot more sense. Buck at home for a whole week? Brutal. “Maddie, Chim and Jee are going, right?” Eddie asks. Buck nods jerkily. “Mmhm. They are. I-It’s just that my parents are expecting me to bring someone and when I don’t, because who the fuck would I ask to suffer for a week for me, they’re going to make comments about how I am going to be alone forever and it-it’s just already on my nerves and I still have nearly three weeks before I even have to go,” he rushes out, abandoning his coffee on the table as he paces back and forth in the kitchen. “I’ll come with you,” Eddie offers. He blinks – he hadn’t exactly thought that one through, but he doesn’t regret it, doesn’t want to take it back. Buck freezes where he’s at, body still as a statue as his head whips to look at Eddie.   -   or; buck and eddie fake date

entry.title: In House Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: JTFox

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,035Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 82

Summary: Buck is a triplet. Daniel is fraternal, while Ethan is identical to Buck. However, no one but the Buckley's knew this. His brothers weren't good people they would constantly hurt him when they were younger and only got worse over time. And while Buck doesn't have proof, he is almost certain both of his brothers have killed people. He hasn't had contact with either of them since he was 18 years old, but what happens when he wakes up from a coma to both of them in his room? What are his brothers planning? Will they get caught or will their plan go unnoticed?
